age_limit.details: Maximum Age Limit: 42 years (as on 01.01.2026) Age Relaxation: SC: 05 years ST: 05 years BC: 05 years EWS: 05 years Ex-service Men: 03 years

qualification.education_qualification: 10th Class or its equivalent qualification, 1 Year work experience in any Govt.
qualification.details: Cook-Cum-Care Taker: 10th Class or its equivalent qualification, 1 Year work experience in any Govt.

selection_process: Merit List based on aggregate marks and experience weightage Counselling
how_to_apply: Candidates who wish to apply for DMHO Ananthapuramu Cook-Cum-Care Taker Recruitment 2026 through offline mode should follow the steps below.
Read the official notification carefully before applying.
Download the application form from the official website: https://ananthapuramu.ap.gov.in.
Fill the application form carefully with correct information.
Attach self-attested copies of required documents such as photograph, signature, ID proof, and certificates.
Check all details carefully before submission.
Send the completed application form to the address mentioned in the notification through Speed Post / Registered Post or as instructed.
Ensure the application reaches before the last date: 30-06-2026.
Keep a photocopy of the submitted application form for future reference.

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to apply for the DMHO Ananthapuramu Cook-Cum-Care Taker recruitment?
faq.answer: The last date to submit the application for the DMHO Ananthapuramu Cook-Cum-Care Taker recruitment is 30th June 2026.

faq.question: Q2. What is the educational qualification required for the Cook-Cum-Care Taker post?
faq.answer: Candidates must have passed the 10th Class or its equivalent qualification and possess 1 year of work experience in any government institution.

faq.question: Q3. What is the age limit for the Cook-Cum-Care Taker position?
faq.answer: The maximum age limit is 42 years as of January 1, 2026. Age relaxation is provided for reserved categories.

faq.question: Q4. What is the salary offered for the Cook-Cum-Care Taker post?
faq.answer: The selected candidate will receive a salary of Rs. 15,000/- per month.

faq.question: Q5. How can I apply for this recruitment?
faq.answer: Applications are to be submitted offline. You need to download the application form, fill it, and send it to the official address before the last date.

faq.question: Q6. What is the application fee for OC and BC categories?
faq.answer: The application fee for candidates belonging to OC and BC categories is Rs. 200/-.

faq.question: Q7. What is the application fee for SC and ST categories?
faq.answer: The application fee for candidates belonging to SC and ST categories is Rs. 100/-.

faq.question: Q8. What is the selection process for the Cook-Cum-Care Taker post?
faq.answer: The selection process will be based on a merit list prepared from aggregate marks and experience weightage, followed by counselling.

faq.question: Q9. Where can I find the application form?
faq.answer: The application form will be available on the official portal https://ananthapuramu.ap.gov.in from 21.06.2026 to 30.06.2026.

faq.question: Q10. What is the total number of vacancies for the Cook-Cum-Care Taker post?
faq.answer: There is a total of 1 vacancy for the Cook-Cum-Care Taker post in this recruitment drive.

faq.question: What is the last date to apply for the DMHO Ananthapuramu Cook-Cum-Care Taker recruitment?
